proof:
by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    cases h with | intro f hf =>
    match hf.2 ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩ with
    | ⟨x, _⟩ => exact absurd x.2 (Nat.not_lt_zero x.1)
failed_attempts:
by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    rcases h with ⟨_, _, h_onto⟩
    obtain ⟨x, -⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero _ x.property

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n =>
    rcases h with ⟨f, -, hf⟩
    rcases hf ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩ with ⟨x, -⟩
    have := x.property
    simp [I] at this
    contradiction

by
  by_contra hnz
  rcases h with ⟨f, _, hIm⟩
  have he : empty (I 0) := fun x hx => Nat.not_lt_zero x hx
  rw [image_empty f he] at hIm
  have h0 : 0 ∈ I n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hnz
  rw [←hIm] at h0
  exact Nat.not_lt_zero 0 h0
successful_attempts:
by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    cases h with | intro f hf =>
    match hf.2 ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩ with
    | ⟨x, _⟩ => exact absurd x.2 (Nat.not_lt_zero x.1)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    have ⟨f, _, h_onto⟩ := h
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n =>
    rcases h with ⟨_, _, h_onto⟩
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩
    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    obtain ⟨_, _, honto⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := honto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    have := x.property
    contradiction

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    cases h with | intro _ hf =>
    cases hf with | intro _ ho =>
    cases ho ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩ with | intro x _ =>
    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n =>
    obtain ⟨_, _, h_onto⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩
    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n
  · rfl
  · rcases h with ⟨_, _, h_onto⟩
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩
    cases x.2

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    rcases (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).mp h with ⟨_, g, _⟩
    exact absurd (g ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩).property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    rcases h with ⟨_, _, ho⟩
    have y : ↑(I (k + 1)) := ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := ho y
    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero _)

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    rcases h with ⟨f, _, h_onto⟩
    have y : I (k + 1) := ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    rcases h_onto y with ⟨x, _⟩
    have := x.property
    contradiction

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl

    have ⟨f, _, h_onto⟩ := h
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩
    have := x.property
    contradiction

    rcases h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩ with ⟨x, -⟩

by
  cases n
  · rfl

    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩

    cases x.property

    exact absurd x.property (Nat.not_lt_zero x.val)

by
  cases n with

    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := hf.2 ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _⟩

by
  cases n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ k =>
    obtain ⟨f, -, honto⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨x, _⟩ := honto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
    have : x.val < 0 := x.property
    contradiction

    obtain ⟨x, -⟩ := honto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩

  match n with

    have ⟨_, _, h_onto⟩ := h
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := h_onto ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ n⟩
    have := x.property
    contradiction

    have y : I (k + 1) := ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_succ k⟩
